description: Pairings that become dormant, redundant, or operationally confusing because their trigger is blocked elsewhere.

S0.title: Network duties are dormant under no hosted service use.
S0.message: The network trigger is blocked by S0.

S1.title: Network notices become internal-only under S1.
S1.message: The notice may still be useful internally, but it no longer reaches public hosted users.

R0.title: Distribution duties are dormant under no redistribution.
R0.message: The downstream distribution trigger is blocked by R0.

M0.title: Derivative duties are dormant under no modification.
M0.message: The derivative-work trigger is blocked by M0.

M1.title: Public derivative duties are dormant under private-only modification.
M1.message: These duties need a public derivative distribution or deployment trigger.
